data.title: Upbit will suspend its deposit and withdrawal services due to Kava network upgrade
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Upbit, Kava Network is about to undergo a network upgrade, and KAVA deposit and withdrawal services will be suspended from 18:00 (KST) on Tuesday, February 25, 2025 until the stability of the network upgrade is confirmed.

data.title: Musk: Grok 3 voice mode may be launched in about a week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk said that Grok 3 voice mode may be launched in about a week. (Jinshi)

data.title: The DOGE team led by Musk will arrive at the US SEC in the next few days to start work
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The DOGE team led by Musk is expected to arrive at the US SEC in the next few days to conduct an audit. (POLITICO)
Earlier today, it was reported that DOGE will audit the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to investigate its potential waste, fraud and abuse.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum capital inflows fell by more than 30% in the past month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Chain analyst Ali YuX shared data showing that in the past month, the capital inflow of Bitcoin and Ethereum has dropped by more than 30%, from US$45 billion to US$30 billion.

data.title: Jupiter co-founder responds to Libra incident: Meteora co-founder Ben will resign, and has hired an independent third party to investigate and publish a report
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Jupiter co-founder meow responded to the Libra incident on X: "Hello everyone, I am meow from Jupiter, and I am also the co-founder of Meteora.
First, I want to reiterate my confidence that no one in Jupiter and Meteora has committed any insider trading or financial misconduct, and no one has obtained any tokens in an improper manner.
Second, we are hiring an independent third party (the well-known law firm Fenwick & West) to investigate and publish a report, and they will publish the report independently.
Third, I support Ben and his statement. I believe what he said about no financial misconduct in dealing with partners.
Meteora has been operating as an independent entity from Jupiter for more than a year, and Ben has been running it without my involvement. He has done an excellent job in building a team, the most innovative DEX in the past year, and the most active LP community in the world.
Although I am not confident about Ben's character, 100% confident in Ben’s leadership, but he has also demonstrated a lack of judgement and care for certain core aspects of the project (given its current size and reputation) over the past few months as the project leader.
Unfortunately, this is unacceptable. Ben understands this and has chosen to resign. Going forward, we will be looking for a new leader for Meteora.
As many can attest, Ben has been a very helpful and kind participant in the ecosystem. I ask that you all not jump to conclusions and treat him as kindly as possible as he attempts to clear his name.
When it comes to token transparency, JUP has always been the gold standard. We are the only major protocol to account for every token in the 3 audit process. We have never sold tokens over the counter, and the use of every major token has been carefully documented and planned by our audits. Token integrity has been paramount to us since day one.
Second, Jupiter is one of the least predatory participants in the ecosystem. We allow users to swap tens of billions of dollars for free, and allow our partners to earn hundreds of millions of dollars in fees, with very little on our end.
For the past year, our perpetual contract fees have been transparently documented and reported with two of the best audit partners in the space. Even our most recent Ultra Mode is also the first time we will charge users a conversion fee, which is 0.05%-0.1%, 10-20x lower than other major platforms.
The vast majority of fees are retained on Solana and invested in jupSOL/JLP, and stay within the ecosystem, except for the amount used to fund talent recruitment and operating expenses.
Personally, I have not sold a single JUP, nor do I trade Meme coins regularly. I have been offered free tokens for marketing purposes on multiple occasions, and I have rejected them all. Before Jupiter, most of the tokens I received from investment/consulting were diamond hands.
I would like to apologize for the stress I have caused the team, community, and the entire ecosystem recently.
While we have a very high standard for token integrity at Jupiter, I would like to apologize for not holding other projects in the space to the same standard.
This is a watershed moment for our industry, and it is now very clear to me that the way to grow the industry is not just through more tokens, but through projects that have the same level of token certainty, long-term consistency, and extreme transparency as JUP.
One of my main goals is to create permissionless products, operating systems, and ethical standards that I believe can form the new foundation for the future of cryptocurrency.
1. Make jup.ag the best decentralized platform
2. Build Jupnet as the network that connects everything
3. Drive standards of certainty, consistency, and transparency in our industry
I am not perfect, and I have learned many important lessons. I hope to learn from them and use the strong systems we have built for JUP to define the next major phase of our industry - growth. ”

data.title: Argentine law firm files lawsuit against U.S. Department of Justice and FBI over LIBRA
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to local media reports, an Argentine law firm filed a criminal complaint with the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) and the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) on February 17 to find out who is behind the collapse of the LIBRA token. The lawsuit also calls for an investigation into the role played by Argentine President Miley.
In addition, the Citizens' Alliance ARI filed a criminal complaint on February 17, asking the Department of Justice to investigate Miley's alleged bribery and fraud allegations, adding that "the government cannot be both judge and jury." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: OpenAI is in talks to open-source a new large-scale language AI model
data.description: According to market sources, OpenAI is in talks to open source a new large-scale language AI model.

data.title: A Shanghai court sentenced a case of building a digital collection platform to deceive others into investing, causing the victim to lose a total of about 1.8 million yuan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Shanghai Procuratorate WeChat published an article to warn against the trap behind "AI digital collections". It is reported that Wu and Wang set up a digital collection platform to attract investors. They falsely advertised that the "digital collections" drawn by AI have appreciation prospects and promised "half price" to protect the principal. They lured victims to buy the platform's first collections and then trade them in the "secondary market". When the victims were unable to trade the collections and asked for a refund, they cut off contact with the victims, causing a total loss of about 1.8 million yuan to the victims. In January 2025, the Jinshan District Procuratorate of Shanghai filed a public prosecution, and Wu and Wang were sentenced to corresponding penalties by the court for the crime of fundraising fraud. (Shanghai Procuratorate WeChat)

data.title: Bitcoin's Bull Market Expected To Continue Amid Institutional Investments
data.description: According to Odaily, a recent report by global investment firm Bernstein suggests that investors should prepare for further increases in Bitcoin-related assets and stocks. Analysts indicate that the Bitcoin bull market is likely to persist as institutional funds continue to flow into the sector. The report highlights that the collective adoption by banks, institutional investors, corporations, and sovereign nations, either directly or through sovereign funds, positions Bitcoin as a significant challenger to gold. Analysts also noted that the Abu Dhabi sovereign wealth fund's purchase of Bitcoin through an ETF is favorable for its future trajectory. Disclosed data reveals that top institutions, including Jane Street Group, Citadel Advisors, and Morgan Stanley, have collectively invested hundreds of millions of dollars in Bitcoin ETFs. Bernstein analysts have previously predicted that Bitcoin could reach $200,000 by the end of 2025.

data.title: Bernstein: Bitcoin bull market will continue as institutional investors enter the market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a recent report from global investment firm Bernstein, investors should prepare for further gains in Bitcoin-related assets and stocks. Analysts pointed out that the Bitcoin bull market will continue as institutional funds continue to flow into the field.
The report said: "The joint adoption of banks, institutional investors, companies, and sovereign states (directly or through sovereign funds) makes Bitcoin a clear challenger to gold." The analyst added that the Abu Dhabi sovereign wealth fund's purchase of Bitcoin through ETFs is beneficial to its future trend.
The data disclosed by it showed that top institutions including Jane Street Group, Citadel Advisors and Morgan Stanley have purchased hundreds of millions of dollars in Bitcoin ETFs. Bernstein analysts previously predicted that Bitcoin will reach $200,000 by the end of 2025. (Decrypt)
